text: In the first image, I feel a curious tension from the quiet, reflective environment. The geometric glass walls and orderly space give an impression of anticipation—as if ideas are about to be exchanged, yet silence reigns for now. In the second image, the vivid colors and bold letters ignite my mind, inviting thoughts about human ingenuity and the unpredictable future of machines. I feel energized and slightly awed to participate in a place dedicated to experimentation and new knowledge.
